input.prompt: Extract all information about this project: what it is, what it does, its purpose, features, installation instructions, dependencies, requirements, and any usage examples.

content.content:
# Ruflo v3.5: Enterprise AI Orchestration Platform

## What It Is
Ruflo is a production-ready multi-agent AI orchestration framework that enhances Claude Code with sophisticated agent coordination capabilities. The platform enables deployment of specialized AI agents working collaboratively on complex software engineering tasks.

## Core Purpose
According to the documentation, it provides "production-ready multi-agent AI orchestration for Claude Code," transforming it into a comprehensive development platform where teams can deploy, coordinate, and optimize specialized agents handling diverse aspects of software projects.

## Key Features

**Agent Capabilities:**
- 100+ specialized, ready-to-use agents for coding, testing, reviewing, security audits, and documentation
- Self-learning architecture that improves routing decisions over time (89% accuracy)
- Agents organize into coordinated swarms with hierarchical or peer-to-peer patterns

**Intelligence Layer (RuVector):**
- SONA self-optimization with sub-millisecond adaptation
- HNSW vector search offering 150-12,500x speed improvements
- Flash Attention providing 2-7x computational speedup
- EWC++ preventing catastrophic forgetting
- LoRA/MicroLoRA for lightweight fine-tuning
- Nine reinforcement learning algorithms (Q-Learning, PPO, DQN, etc.)

**Memory & Learning:**
- Persistent vector database with ~61 microsecond search times
- Knowledge graph with PageRank and community detection
- Collective agent memory with 8 memory types
- ReasoningBank for pattern storage and trajectory learning

**Swarm Coordination:**
- Queen-led hierarchies managing worker agents
- Byzantine fault-tolerant consensus (f < n/3)
- Multiple topologies: mesh, hierarchical, ring, star
- Drift prevention mechanisms for coding tasks

**Optimization:**
- Agent Booster (WebAssembly) handles simple code transforms in <1ms
- Token optimization reducing API costs by 30-50%
- Extends Claude Code usage by approximately 250%

**Multi-Provider Support:**
- Claude, GPT, Gemini, Cohere, and local models like Llama
- Automatic failover with cost-based routing
- Smart model selection based on task complexity

## Installation

**Prerequisites:**
- Node.js 20+
- npm 9+, pnpm, or bun
- Claude Code must be installed first via: `npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code`

**One-Line Installation (Recommended):**
```bash
curl -fsSL https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/ruvnet/ruflo@main/scripts/install.sh | bash
```

**Full Setup (with MCP and diagnostics):**
```bash
curl -fsSL https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/ruvnet/ruflo@main/scripts/install.sh | bash -s -- --full
```

**Via NPX:**
```bash
npx ruflo@latest init --wizard
```

## Dependencies & Requirements
- Node.js runtime
- Package manager (npm/pnpm/bun)
- PostgreSQL (optional, for RuVector)
- LLM API keys (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, etc.)

## Usage Examples

**Basic Initialization:**
```bash
npx ruflo@latest init --wizard
```

**Check Intelligence Status:**
```bash
npx ruflo@latest hooks intelligence --status
```

**Anti-Drift Swarm Configuration:**
```javascript
swarm_init({
  topology: "hierarchical",
  maxAgents: 8,
  strategy: "specialized"
})
```

**Token Optimization Integration:**
```javascript
import { getTokenOptimizer } from '@claude-flow/integration';
const optimizer = await getTokenOptimizer();
const context = await optimizer.getCompactContext("auth patterns");
```

## Architecture Overview
The system flows through four primary layers: user interface (CLI/Claude Code), intelligent routing (Q-Learning router with 8 experts and 130+ skills), coordinated swarms (with topologies and consensus algorithms), and finally LLM providers for reasoning tasks. A learning loop continuously captures successful patterns and refines routing strategies.

## Additional Notable Aspects
- Enterprise-grade security with CVE hardening, bcrypt encryption, and input validation
- 12 background workers for automated audits and optimization
- GitHub integration for PR management and workflow automation
- MIT license
- 27,800+ GitHub stars, 3,000+ forks, 6,007 commits

# RuFlo v3.5: Enterprise AI Orchestration Platform - Summary

## Project Overview

RuFlo (formerly Claude Flow) is a comprehensive multi-agent AI orchestration framework that transforms Claude Code into a powerful platform for deploying, coordinating, and optimizing specialized AI agents working together on complex software engineering tasks.

**Core Purpose:** Enable teams to deploy 100+ specialized agents in coordinated swarms with self-learning capabilities, fault-tolerant consensus, and enterprise-grade security.

## Key Architecture Components

The system operates through distinct layers:

- **Entry Layer:** CLI/MCP server with AIDefence security scanning
- **Routing Layer:** Q-Learning router with 8 mixture-of-experts and 130+ skills
- **Swarm Coordination:** Multiple topologies (mesh, hierarchical, ring, star) with Raft/Byzantine/Gossip consensus
- **Agent Pool:** 100+ specialized agents (coder, tester, reviewer, architect, security, etc.)
- **Intelligence:** RuVector system with SONA self-optimization, EWC++ memory consolidation, Flash Attention
- **Memory:** HNSW vector search, AgentDB, PostgreSQL bridge with 77+ SQL functions
- **Providers:** Support for Claude, GPT, Gemini, Cohere, Ollama with automatic failover

## Self-Learning Capabilities

The platform includes several advanced learning mechanisms:

- **SONA:** Self-Optimizing Neural Architecture enabling routing optimization in under 0.05ms
- **EWC++:** Elastic Weight Consolidation preventing catastrophic forgetting
- **ReasoningBank:** Pattern storage with trajectory learning (RETRIEVE→JUDGE→DISTILL cycles)
- **LearningBridge:** Connects insights to neural pipelines for continuous improvement
- **9 RL Algorithms:** Q-Learning, SARSA, PPO, DQN, A2C, Decision Transformer and others

## Installation Requirements

**Prerequisites:**
- Node.js 20+
- npm 9+, pnpm, or bun
- Claude Code must be installed globally first

**Quick Install Options:**

```bash
# One-line installer (recommended)
curl -fsSL https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/ruvnet/ruflo@main/scripts/install.sh | bash

# Via npx (no installation needed)
npx ruflo@latest init --wizard

# Global installation
npm install -g ruflo@latest
```

## Core Features

**Intelligent Routing:** "Skip expensive LLM calls when possible. Simple edits use WASM (free), medium tasks use cheaper models."

**Agent Booster (WASM):** Handles simple code transforms without LLM calls—352x faster than standard approaches, supporting transformations like var-to-const, add-types, async-await conversion.

**Token Optimization:** Achieves 30-50% token reduction through ReasoningBank retrieval, agent booster edits, result caching, and batch optimization.

**Swarm Coordination:** Four topology options (hierarchical, mesh, ring, star) with Byzantine fault tolerance supporting up to 1/3 failing agents.

**Vector Database:** HNSW-based search achieving sub-millisecond retrieval with 150x-12,500x performance improvements over basic approaches.

## MCP Integration

RuFlo operates as an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server providing 313 tools across 31 modules:

- Coordination tools (swarm initialization, agent spawning)
- Memory operations (search, store, retrieve)
- GitHub integration (PR management, code review)
- Background workers (12 auto-triggered automation tasks)
- Lifecycle hooks (25+ events for customization)

**Connect to:**
- Claude Desktop/Code
- VS Code
- Cursor IDE
- Windsurf
- ChatGPT (with Developer Mode)
- JetBrains IDEs
- Google AI Studio

## Security Architecture

Seven-layer protection including:
- Input validation with boundary checking
- Path traversal prevention (blocked patterns: `../`, `~/.`, `/etc/`)
- Command sandboxing with allowlisted commands
- Prototype pollution defenses
- TOCTOU race condition prevention
- Information disclosure prevention via error sanitization
- Active CVE monitoring and patching

## Configuration & Customization

**Environment Variables:**
- `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` (required for Claude)
- `OPENAI_API_KEY` (optional for GPT)
- `GOOGLE_API_KEY` (optional for Gemini)
- `CLAUDE_FLOW_LOG_LEVEL` (debug/info/warn/error)
- `CLAUDE_FLOW_TOOL_GROUPS` (comma-separated tool selection)

**LLM Provider Support:** 6 providers with load-balancing strategies (round-robin, least-loaded, latency-based, cost-based).

**Embedding Providers:** 4 options ranging from 3ms local ONNX to cloud APIs, supporting dimensions from 384 to 3072.

## Plugin Ecosystem

Extended capabilities through optional plugins:

- **@claude-flow/plugin-agentic-qe:** Quality engineering with 58 agents across 12 contexts
- **@claude-flow/plugin-prime-radiant:** Mathematical AI interpretability
- **Domain-specific:** Healthcare, financial, legal compliance plugins
- **Development intelligence:** Code analysis, test generation, performance optimization

## Key Performance Metrics

| Operation | Target | Achieved |
|-----------|--------|----------|
| CLI cold start | <500ms | ✓ |
| MCP server init | <400ms | ✓ |
| Agent spawn | <200ms | ✓ |
| Vector search | <1ms | ✓ |
| SONA adaptation | <0.05ms | ✓ |
| Consensus latency | <100ms | ✓ |

## License & Community

**License:** MIT

**Community:** GitHub project, 6,000+ commits, supports Agentics Foundation standards

content.text:
Aqui está un resumen completo de **Ruflo v3.5**:

---

## Que es Ruflo

**Ruflo** (anteriormente llamado Claude Flow) es una plataforma de orquestacion multi-agente de nivel empresarial disenada para ampliar las capacidades de Claude Code. Permite desplegar, coordinar y optimizar mas de 100 agentes de IA especializados que trabajan en equipo sobre tareas complejas de ingenieria de software.

- Repositorio: `https://github.com/ruvnet/ruflo`
- Licencia: MIT
- Estadisticas: ~27.800 estrellas, 3.000+ forks, 6.000+ commits

---

## Que hace

Ruflo transforma Claude Code en una plataforma de desarrollo completa mediante:

- **Enrutamiento inteligente**: Un router con Q-Learning y 8 expertos mezcla-de-expertos con 130+ habilidades decide automaticamente que agente y que modelo usar segun la complejidad de la tarea.
- **Enjambres de agentes (Swarms)**: Los agentes se organizan en topologias (jerarquica, malla, anillo, estrella) con tolerancia a fallos bizantinos (hasta 1/3 de agentes fallando).
- **Agent Booster (WebAssembly)**: Para tareas simples (var-to-const, add-types, async-await), ejecuta transformaciones sin llamadas a LLM -- 352x mas rapido.
- **Optimizacion de tokens**: Reduce el consumo de tokens entre un 30-50%, lo que extiende el uso de Claude Code en aproximadamente un 250%.
- **RuVector (IA interna)**: Motor vectorial con busqueda HNSW, SONA self-optimization (<0.05ms), Flash Attention, EWC++ y 9 algoritmos de reinforcement learning.
- **MCP Server**: Expone 313 herramientas en 31 modulos compatibles con Claude Desktop, VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, JetBrains, ChatGPT y Google AI Studio.

---

## Dependencias y Requisitos

| Requisito | Detalle |
|---|---|
| Node.js | Version 20 o superior |
| Gestor de paquetes | npm 9+, pnpm o bun |
| Claude Code | Debe estar instalado previamente (`npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code`) |
| PostgreSQL | Opcional, requerido para RuVector (base de datos vectorial) |
| API Keys | `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` obligatoria; opcionales: `OPENAI_API_KEY`, `GOOGLE_API_KEY` |

---

## Instalacion

**Opcion 1 -- Instalador en una linea (recomendada):**
```bash
curl -fsSL https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/ruvnet/ruflo@main/scripts/install.sh | bash
```

**Opcion 2 -- Instalacion completa (incluye MCP y diagnosticos):**
```bash
curl -fsSL https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/ruvnet/ruflo@main/scripts/install.sh | bash -s -- --full
```

**Opcion 3 -- Via NPX (sin instalacion global):**
```bash
npx ruflo@latest init --wizard
```

**Opcion 4 -- Instalacion global con npm:**
```bash
npm install -g ruflo@latest
```

Tras instalar, el asistente de configuracion (`--wizard`) guia la configuracion inicial.

---

## Proveedores de LLM Soportados

Claude (Anthropic), GPT (OpenAI), Gemini (Google), Cohere, Llama (via Ollama) y otros modelos locales. Incluye failover automatico y enrutamiento basado en coste y latencia.

---

## Variables de Entorno Clave

| Variable | Uso |
|---|---|
| `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` | Obligatoria para Claude |
| `OPENAI_API_KEY` | Opcional para GPT |
| `GOOGLE_API_KEY` | Opcional para Gemini |
| `CLAUDE_FLOW_LOG_LEVEL` | Nivel de logs: debug/info/warn/error |
| `CLAUDE_FLOW_TOOL_GROUPS` | Seleccion de grupos de herramientas |

---

## Metricas de Rendimiento

| Operacion | Objetivo |
|---|---|
| Arranque CLI | < 500ms |
| Inicio servidor MCP | < 400ms |
| Spawn de agente | < 200ms |
| Busqueda vectorial | < 1ms |
| Adaptacion SONA | < 0.05ms |

---

En resumen, Ruflo es una capa de orquestacion avanzada sobre Claude Code que aporta auto-aprendizaje, coordinacion de enjambres, memoria persistente y soporte multi-proveedor, orientado a equipos de desarrollo que quieren automatizar flujos complejos con IA.
